question: What is the purpose of the One-Time Vendor (OTV) process?
options: Simplified approval flow for suppliers engaged for a single or non-recurring transaction
Reduced data requirements for suppliers engaged for a single or non-recurring transaction
Faster vendor creation for suppliers engaged for a single or non-recurring transaction
All of the above

question: What is the expected outcome of the auto-translation of standard information in Coupa?
options: Improved user experience for internal users
Enhanced supplier experience
Increased data accuracy
All of the above

question: What is the trigger for the internal approval workflow in the supplier onboarding process?
options: Buyer initiates the supplier onboarding process
Supplier receives an invitation to register
Internal user registers a new supplier in Coupa
Supplier information is updated in Coupa

question: What is the expected behavior when a supplier is updated with new information in Coupa?
options: Supplier status is updated automatically
Supplier information is updated in real-time
Supplier status remains unchanged
All of the above

question: What is the expected outcome of the supplier onboarding process?
options: Supplier is created in Coupa
Supplier receives an invitation to register
Internal approval workflow is triggered
All of the above
